body:
#### PR description:

Add the changes suggested by Vadim with one example SimG4CMS/Calo/test/python/runHGCalColdbox_cfg.py

#### PR validation:

Tested using the script

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Should be backported to CMSSW_16_1_X and also to CMSSW_20_X_Y
title: Phase2-hgx367A Add the changes suggested by Vadim with one example SimG4CMS/Calo/test/python/runHGCalColdbox_cfg.py
